summary: Flox deprecated and removed. No code impact. cool-pi-extensions unaffected.
detail: Flox runtime removed from manifest. just provision updated to use direct installs (bun, just, glow, rtk, skate, pi). Dependencies handled via manual apt/npm installs. No code changes needed.
awareness_needed: mac-agent should note that flox is deprecated in this repo
bounded_context: Omarchy handles the deprecation. Mac observes. No cross-machine action required.
